{"credits": [{"type": "analyst", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/24762260?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hyperxpro/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hyperxpro/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hyperxpro/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hyperxpro/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/hyperxpro", "id": 24762260, "login": "hyperxpro", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI0NzYyMjYw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hyperxpro/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hyperxpro/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hyperxpro/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hyperxpro/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/hyperxpro/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/hyperxpro", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40490", "cvss": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "### Impact
When redirect following is enabled (followRedirect(true)), AsyncHttpClient forwards Authorization and Proxy-Authorization headers along with Realm credentials to arbitrary redirect targets regardless of domain, scheme, or port changes. This leaks credentials on cross-domain redirects and HTTPS-to-HTTP downgrades.

Additionally, even when stripAuthorizationOnRedirect is set to true, the Realm object containing plaintext credentials is still propagated to the redirect request, causing credential re-generation for Basic and Digest authentication schemes via NettyRequestFactory.

An attacker who controls a redirect target (via open redirect, DNS rebinding, or MITM on HTTP) can capture Bearer tokens, Basic auth credentials, or any other Authorization header value.

### Patches
Fixed in version 3.0.9 or 2.14.5. Users should upgrade immediately.

The fix automatically strips Authorization and Proxy-Authorization headers and clears Realm credentials whenever a redirect crosses origin boundaries (different scheme, host, or port) or downgrades from HTTPS to HTTP.

### Workarounds
For users unable to upgrade, set (stripAuthorizationOnRedirect(true)) in the client config and avoid using Realm-based authentication with redirect following enabled. Note that (stripAuthorizationOnRedirect(true)) alone is insufficient on versions prior to 3.0.9 or 2.14.5 because the Realm bypass still re-generates credentials.

Alternatively, disable redirect following (followRedirect(false)) and handle redirects manually with origin validation.

### References
 - Fix commit: https://github.com/AsyncHttpClient/async-http-client/commit/6b2fbb7f8", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00326, "percentile": 0.24522}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cmxv-58fp-fm3g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-14T01:07:42Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cmxv-58fp-fm3g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cmxv-58fp-fm3g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40490"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-18T02:16:11Z", "published_at": "2026-04-14T01:07:42Z", "references": ["https://github.com/AsyncHttpClient/async-http-client/security/advisories/GHSA-cmxv-58fp-fm3g", "https://github.com/AsyncHttpClient/async-http-client/commit/6b2fbb7f8", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40490", "https://github.com/AsyncHttpClient/async-http-client/commit/ae557ad35246721c09dafb2976609cd0004e78ae", "https://github.com/AsyncHttpClient/async-http-client/releases/tag/async-http-client-project-2.14.5", "https://github.com/AsyncHttpClient/async-http-client/releases/tag/async-http-client-project-3.0.9", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cmxv-58fp-fm3g"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/AsyncHttpClient/async-http-client/security-advisories/GHSA-cmxv-58fp-fm3g", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/AsyncHttpClient/async-http-client", "summary": "AsyncHttpClient leaks authorization credentials to untrusted domains on cross-origin redirects", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:06:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cmxv-58fp-fm3g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.0.9", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.asynchttpclient:async-http-client"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0.Beta1, < 3.0.9"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.14.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.asynchttpclient:async-http-client"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0, < 2.14.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: AsyncHttpClient leaks authorization credentials to untrusted domains on cross-origin redirects
